summary: Iter47 Notifications Bell + Bounty Winner badge polish — BACKEND 87/87 GREEN (8 new iter47 + 79 regression: iter46 bounties, iter45 hosting enforcement, iter44 hosting/promo, iter43 runtime, iter42 webhooks/onboarding). FRONTEND verified end-to-end via Playwright: bell renders next to user menu, cyan unread badge shows count when unread>0, dropdown opens with NOTIFICATIONS header + 'X NEW' chip + 'Mark all read' link, row icons (Trophy for bounty_won) + relative time + cyan unread dots, click-outside closes, mark-all-read POSTs and zeroes badge. /marketplace card with bounty_winner=true renders gold Trophy 'BOUNTY WINNER' badge on lower-left with correct title attribute (data-testid=bounty-winner-badge-{listing_id}).
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell polls /unread-count every 30s — fine for a few users but at scale (>1k concurrent) this is a thundering-herd risk. Consider SSE or websocket push as a follow-up.

Backend /api/notifications/{id}/read returns 404 for cross-user access (good — avoids enumeration). Consider also returning 404 for non-existent IDs to keep semantics consistent (likely already does — quick check recommended).
Exchange listings projection now exposes bounty_winner_id/title to all public viewers — confirm this is desired (it is, per the brief, but worth noting for any future privacy hardening).

_emit_notification still uses fire-and-forget asyncio.create_task without storing the task reference (carried over from iter46) — minor GC risk under heavy concurrency; acceptable for current MVP load.
test_credentials: admin@nova.ai/admin123 (admin, unlimited compute) and freeuser@test.com/test123 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Frontend token key is `taskforce_token` in localStorage.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily inserted a published exchange_listings doc with bounty_winner=true to validate the marketplace Trophy badge UI; deleted after verification. Notifications generated by test runs were also wiped from `notifications` collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter47 + regression tests pass. The /marketplace badge only renders on cards whose underlying exchange_listings row has bounty_winner=true; to visually verify, either (a) run the iter47 test_winning_exchange_listing_gets_bounty_winner_badge and reload BEFORE cleanup, or (b) seed an exchange_listings doc with bounty_winner=true manually. NotificationBell uses `useAuth().token` and React Router `Link` for row navigation — must mount inside <BrowserRouter>. The mark-all-read flow POSTs to /api/notifications/mark-all-read; verified that local state zeroes immediately. Dropdown auto-fetches on open via GET /api/notifications?limit=20.
rca of the issue: No issues encountered. All P0 backend endpoints + frontend interactions behave per problem statement.
